items.title: It’s illegal for children to play pinball in SC. A bill hopes to change that
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Sources: B. Tkachuk to Panthers, joins brother
items.dek: Brady Tkachuk, captain of the Ottawa Senators, was dealt to the Florida Panthers, sources said Sunday, for a host of draft picks, allowing the wing to join his
items.body: Brady Tkachuk, captain of the Ottawa Senators, was dealt to the Florida Panthers, sources said Sunday, for a host of draft picks, allowing the wing to join his brother, Matthew, on a two-time Stanley Cup champion team that missed the playoffs this year.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: UNC cools off Arkansas to force decisive Game 3
items.dek: Ryan Lynch and Caden Glauber cooled off Oklahoma's bats, Owen Hull and Cooper Nicholson homered, and North Carolina beat Oklahoma 6-2 in Game 2 of the Men's Col
items.body: Ryan Lynch and Caden Glauber cooled off Oklahoma's bats, Owen Hull and Cooper Nicholson homered, and North Carolina beat Oklahoma 6-2 in Game 2 of the Men's College World Series finals Sunday.
items.author: IriLine Desk
